---
name: Roadmap Feature Vote
about: Vote or comment on planned roadmap features
title: '[ROADMAP] '
labels: roadmap
assignees: ''
---

**Feature Category**
- [ ] Home-Manager Integration
- [ ] AI Enhancements
- [ ] Advanced Package Management
- [ ] NixOS Module Management
- [ ] System State Management
- [ ] Quality of Life Features

**Specific Feature**
Which feature from the roadmap are you commenting on? (Link to the roadmap if possible)

**Your Interest Level**
- [ ] 🔥 Would use this daily
- [ ] 👍 Would be nice to have
- [ ] 🤔 Neutral
- [ ] 👎 Not useful for me

**Use Case**
Describe how you would use this feature or why it's important to you.

**Priority Suggestion**
What priority level do you think this should have?
- [ ] High Priority
- [ ] Medium Priority
- [ ] Low Priority

**Additional Context**
Any other thoughts, concerns, or suggestions about this feature?

---

**Note:** This template is for voting and providing feedback on existing roadmap items. To suggest new features not in the roadmap, please use the [Feature Request](?expand=1&template=feature_request.md) template.
